name: Debian
description: Community-driven free operating system emphasizing collaboration and reliability.

name: Fedora
description: Innovative distribution sponsored by Red Hat for desktops, servers, clouds, and IoT.

name: Arch Linux
description: Lightweight, flexible distribution emphasizing simplicity, with a strong community and community-operated package repository.

name: Linux Mint
description: Beginner-friendly distribution developed by Linux Mint team, designed to work out of the box with focus on ease of use and speed.

name: Zorin OS
description: Beginner-friendly distribution developed by Zorin Group designed to make your computer faster.

name: openSUSE
description: Versatile distribution sponsored by SUSE for desktops, servers, and containers with stable and rolling options.

name: Ubuntu
description: Open source distribution developed by Canonical, designed for stability, security, and broad enterprise use across cloud, edge, and IoT.

name: Kubuntu
description: Community-driven Ubuntu flavor for a smooth, customizable experience.

name: NixOS
description: Declarative distribution focused on reproducible, reliable builds and deployments.

name: CachyOS
description: Performance-focused distribution rebuilt with CPU optimizations for faster experience.

name: Solus
description: Community-driven distribution built for personal computers, offering a modern open-source OS to enhance daily use and hardware performance.

name: AnduinOS
description: Beginner-friendly distribution designed for easy transition, privacy, and performance.

name: TUXEDO OS
description: Optimized distribution from TUXEDO Computers for seamless operation.

name: EndeavourOS
description: Community-driven distribution offering a lightweight, terminal-centric system ready for personalization with strong community support.

name: PikaOS
description: Gaming-focused distribution with custom packages for performance and compatibility.

name: Pop! OS
description: Distribution developed by System76 to enhance productivity and user control.

name: Manjaro
description: Distribution enhancing accessibility for people and organizations with enterprise-grade support.

name: Nobara
description: Hobby project tuned for gaming, streaming, and content creation with preconfigured tools.

name: Endless OS
description: Distribution from Endless Foundation, empowers youth via game-based learning to build digital skills and create futures.
